summary: The diff implements many of the required changes, but several requirements are partially or fully missing. Key gaps include: the explicit removal of caffeine.ai branding is not evidenced, the Task Queue page enhancements (REQ-7) are not shown, the Hospital Sample form changes (REQ-8 through REQ-12) are not shown, the Home Collection Queue redesign (REQ-13) is not shown, the Profile page additions (REQ-14) are not fully shown, and the Attendance page Today Summary / End Shift confirmation details (REQ-4, REQ-5, REQ-6, REQ-15) are not directly evidenced. The backend changes in main.mo and migration.mo partially address REQ-16. The layouts show the logo added and header height reduced (REQ-2). Global UI improvements appear in index.css and component files (REQ-3). However, due to truncation, some implementations may exist but are not visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the 'Built with using caffeine.ai' footer/branding text from all screens and layouts.
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff that caffeine.ai branding was explicitly removed from any layout file. The layout files are shown but no before/after evidence of removal is present.

missing_requirements.requirement: On the Attendance screen, add a Today Summary section displaying Total Samples Collected, Cash Collected, UPI Collected, and Pending Amount.
missing_requirements.reason: No PhlebotomistAttendancePage or AttendancePage file is shown in the diff. The Today Summary section implementation cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Rename End Shift button to End Shift & Submit Summary with a confirmation popup containing the exact specified message.
missing_requirements.reason: No attendance page file is shown in the diff to confirm this change was made.

missing_requirements.requirement: Enforce that a phlebotomist cannot start a new shift if a previous shift is still open, with an informative message.
missing_requirements.reason: ShiftGuard.tsx only handles redirecting when no active shift exists. No evidence that blocking start-shift when one is already active is implemented with the required message.

missing_requirements.requirement: On TaskQueuePage, add a Refresh button, Last Updated timestamp, 15-second refetchInterval, and updated empty state message.
missing_requirements.reason: No TaskQueuePage file is shown in the diff. These changes cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: On Hospital Sample form, make the Hospital field a read-only dropdown populated from admin-assigned hospitals list.
missing_requirements.reason: No AddHospitalSamplePage file is shown in the diff. The implementation cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: On Hospital Sample form, enforce exactly 10 numeric digits for mobile number with inline validation.
missing_requirements.reason: No AddHospitalSamplePage file is shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: On Hospital Sample form, display MRP and Offer Price after test selection, auto-calculate Final Amount as read-only with lock icon.
missing_requirements.reason: No AddHospitalSamplePage file is shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: On Hospital Sample form, restrict Payment Mode to three options and auto-fill Amount Received for Cash/UPI modes.
missing_requirements.reason: No AddHospitalSamplePage file is shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: On Hospital Sample form, add a confirmation dialog before submission showing sample summary.
missing_requirements.reason: No AddHospitalSamplePage file is shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Redesign HomeCollectionQueuePage with specified card fields and action buttons.
missing_requirements.reason: No HomeCollectionQueuePage file is shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add Assigned Hospitals List, Support/Call Admin, App Version, and Logout confirmation popup to the phlebotomist Profile page.
missing_requirements.reason: No Profile page file is shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure Today Summary is rendered and visible before End Shift & Submit Summary button is enabled; show zero values if no samples.
missing_requirements.reason: No attendance page file is shown in the diff to confirm this logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin can update/set assigned hospitals for a phlebotomist.
missing_requirements.reason: The migration.mo and truncated main.mo show the data structure for assignedHospitals, but there is no explicit evidence of an admin-callable update function for assigning hospitals in the visible portions of the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate backend/migration.mo module file was added outside of main.mo
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint states to keep all Motoko logic within the single main actor (backend/main.mo). Adding a separate migration.mo file may violate this constraint.

hallucinated_features.description: Demo mode role-selection buttons in StaffLoginScreen for Phlebotomist, Lab Admin, and Super Admin
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request adding or modifying demo mode login functionality. This feature is not listed in any requirement.
